title: 05746_Rockmate_an_Efficient_Fast_Automatic_and_Generic_Tool_for_Re-materialization_in_PyTorch
positive_examples: Rockmate reduces memory consumption for training deep neural networks by a factor of 2 to 5, allowing for larger models to be trained on limited hardware resources.
The tool is open source, promoting accessibility and collaboration in the AI research community, which can lead to broader societal benefits.
